title: Can we get the My Work view of items in the regular board view

posts.author: mchinsky (Mark Chinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the way you can see both the Item Card data & things like updates at the same time as often want to update my notes while changing the due date.

in regular boards you have to go to two different tabs to do this.

image1182×1141 91.3 KB

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be great! We added item cards and then added some fields to that and set it as the default view, but having all of the columns visible would allow you to update fields whilst reading the context of the updates etc
